proposal_line: If we're doing this, can we pick the book now?
intent_guidance: Open this menu when Isla is moving from listening into recommendation.
invalid_choice_text: Noa waits, hands folded over the table. Choose one of the books.
narrative_lines: The rain has softened to a steady patter against the front window. Noa rests her elbows on the table, waiting without urgency. The moment between diagnosis and prescription — between being heard and being steered.

options.title: Echoes of the Open Window
options.menu_text: grief, unfinished conversations, and making room for unresolved love.

options.title: Index of Small Escapes
options.menu_text: coping through routines, avoidance, and slow honesty.

options.title: The Perfectly Managed Life
options.menu_text: control, productivity, and emotional distance disguised as discipline.

proposal_line: Could I have something warm before I keep reading?
intent_guidance: Open when Noa asks for support at the first reading checkpoint (but let her reflect naturally first).
selection_prompt: Noa asks for support. How do you respond?
invalid_choice_text: Noa is still waiting for your response.

options.title: Serve coffee
options.menu_text: Serve coffee and invite her to keep reading while it's still hot.

options.title: Serve pastry
options.menu_text: Serve a homemade pastry and give her a few minutes of quiet.

options.title: Ask her to push through
options.menu_text: Tell her to keep reading first and discuss comfort later.

proposal_line: I'm getting pulled in, but it's a lot. Could we pause a minute?
intent_guidance: Open when Noa asks for regulation at the halfway checkpoint (let her reflection land first).
selection_prompt: Noa asks for a pause. How do you respond?
invalid_choice_text: Noa is waiting for your call.

options.title: Offer water and breathing space
options.menu_text: Bring water, lower the pressure, and let her settle before continuing.

options.title: Offer a brief reflection
options.menu_text: Name one pattern you hear and ask if she wants to test it against the next chapter.

options.title: Push a strong interpretation
options.menu_text: Give a firm interpretation and ask her to accept it before continuing.

proposal_line: I can finish, but I need one thing: should we talk now or after the last pages?
intent_guidance: Open when Noa asks for final pacing support (let the late-stage reflection happen first).
selection_prompt: Noa asks how to handle the final stretch. Choose your approach:
invalid_choice_text: Noa watches your expression, waiting for direction.

options.title: Let her finish, then debrief
options.menu_text: Prioritize completion first, then hold a clean reflection space.

options.title: Do a short check-in now
options.menu_text: Spend two minutes grounding the insight before she reads the ending.

options.title: Rush to the ending
options.menu_text: Push to finish quickly and postpone emotional processing.
